reason: Full pre-rendered bitmap-record payload for all true x/y/z orientations exceeded the C64 PRG image budget.
nextMove: Replace full bitmap-record payloads with compact endpoint/line-command payloads and a small runtime line drawer.
liPlusPlusMeaning: Workbench should generate the 24-orientation graph and compact endpoint payloads; the C64 runtime should only look up orientation transitions and draw prepared line commands.
